content: Uses ESM imports with explicit .js extensions (e.g., from './commands.js'). Files use kebab-case, classes PascalCase, functions camelCase, constants UPPER_SNAKE_CASE. Linter is Biome (not ESLint).

description: Code after yield in async generator never executes - training capture was placed after final yield, so it never ran in -p mode when consumer exits after receiving message
resolution: Move all side effects (capture, logging, await) BEFORE the final yield statement in async generators

content: In async generator functions, place all side effects (logging, capture, await) BEFORE the final yield - code after yield only runs if consumer calls next() again
